nodes.name: 袋鼠島
nodes.summary: 袋鼠島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、Purple-crowned lorikeet、壯麗細尾鷯鶯等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bassian thrush
nodes.summary: Bassian thrush（Bassian thrush，学名 Zoothera lunulata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于塔斯馬尼亞州、巴斯海峡、袋鼠島，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
nodes.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联47种鸟类，包括澳大利亚麻鸭、Brown quail、Hoary-headed grebe等47种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 巴斯海峡
nodes.summary: 巴斯海峡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括White-fronted tern、短尾鹱、Fairy prion等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in Tasmania, on some larger islands of Bass Strait, and on Kangaroo Island

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in Tasmania, on some larger islands of Bass Strait, and on Kangaroo Island

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The population appears to be declining because of ongoing habitat destruction and degradation, but not at a rate that is concerning. The Bassian thrush lives in shrubland, forests, and rainforests. It appears to be a resident species, but there is some evidence that some individuals have nomadic tendencies, usually in the non-breeding season. The thrush ranges in colour from brown to olive, with a white ring around its eyes and black bars on its back, rear, and head

links.label: 受威胁于
